p66_join_audit.doubleheader_note: 28 duplicate (date, home_team) keys in odds CSV likely reflect doubleheaders. P64 used last-row-wins dedup (implicit). Not treated as a mapping error.

step2_market_edge_blockers.market_edge_lane_reason: 2025 edge stable-negative + 2024 odds gap unresolved + API key missing + production governance frozen

field_specifications.description: Unique game identifier (matchable to prediction JSONL)
Local game date
MLB season year (e.g. 2024, 2025)
Canonical home team name/abbrev
Canonical away team name/abbrev
Named sportsbook or licensed data vendor
Betting market type
UTC timestamp when line was captured
UTC scheduled game start time
American odds for home team (e.g. -120, +110)
American odds for away team
Vig-removed implied probability for home team
Vig-removed implied probability for away team
Where in game lifecycle line was taken
True if line was captured before game start
True if this is the closing line
Legal license status of data source
URL or vendor identifier of original data source
Whether raw data may be committed to repo
SHA256 of raw line record for tamper detection
UTC timestamp this record was created/ingested

known_partial_sources: P67 PATH_B partial — needs review before use
legality_requirements.authorized_path: PATH_A: The Odds API (P70 CEO-authorized, P71 awaiting key)

step3_legal_odds_contract.notes: This contract governs future P81+ odds ingestion. No odds dataset currently exists meeting all requirements. The Odds API (PATH A) is CEO-authorized but key not yet received (P71). This contract must be re-validated once legal data arrives.

primary_125.prohibited_interpretation: Do NOT claim market edge until P82 dry-run passes. Do NOT deploy Kelly. Do NOT produce betting recommendation.
primary_125.notes: Primary Tier C rule. Hit rate 0.583 on 2025 fixture.

shadow_100.prohibited_interpretation: Shadow rule only. May not be promoted to primary without P76 re-evaluation. Do NOT deploy Kelly.
shadow_100.notes: Shadow Tier C rule. Hit rate 0.569 on 2025 fixture.

tier_b_conditional.market_edge_eligibility: CONDITIONAL: eligible only if future live P79 passes operational research gate (2026 live Tier B n>=200 and performance_ok=True)
tier_b_conditional.prohibited_interpretation: P79B fixture result (2025 data) is NOT a 2026 live conclusion. Tier B remains RESEARCH_ONLY until live P79 passes. Do NOT compute Tier B EV/CLV/Kelly. Do NOT deploy.
tier_b_conditional.notes: P79B: hit_rate=0.534, AUC=0.552. Gate fails on performance_ok. Harness built. Waiting for 2026 live accumulation.

baseline_50.prohibited_interpretation: Baseline reference only. Not a standalone rule. Do NOT use as primary or shadow without re-evaluation.

gate_a_data_legality.name: Data Legality
gate_a_data_legality.description: Confirms the odds dataset originates from a legal, licensed source.
gate_a_data_legality.current_state: BLOCKED — no legal dataset exists yet
gate_a_data_legality.unblocked_by: Obtaining The Odds API key (PATH A, P70/P71) and receiving data

gate_b_schema.name: Schema Validation
gate_b_schema.description: Confirms all 21 required fields are present and valid.
conditions: odds_timestamp_utc and game_start_utc are valid ISO8601
gate_b_schema.gate_passes_when: ALL conditions true for >= 95% of rows
gate_b_schema.unblocked_by: Gate A passing + P81 schema validator built

gate_c_mapping.name: Side & Game Mapping
gate_c_mapping.description: Confirms odds rows can be matched to prediction JSONL rows.
conditions: side mapping verified (home/away consistent with prediction JSONL)
home/away team names mapped to canonical identifiers
game_id linkable to prediction game_id or (game_date + home_team + away_team)
gate_c_mapping.unblocked_by: Gates A+B passing + P81 mapping validator built

gate_d_metric_readiness.name: Metric Computation Readiness
gate_d_metric_readiness.description: Governs when edge/CLV/EV/Kelly may be computed.
conditions: edge may be computed only after implied_home_prob verified (Gate B)
CLV may be computed only after both is_pregame and is_closing rows exist
EV computation requires separate explicit authorization (not in P80)
Kelly deployment requires separate CEO authorization (not in P80)
EV/Kelly remain PROHIBITED until separate approval granted
gate_d_metric_readiness.gate_passes_when: implied prob verified AND (for CLV) closing data present
gate_d_metric_readiness.unblocked_by: Gates A+B+C passing + closing line dataset available

gate_e_cross_year_validation.name: Cross-Year Validation
gate_e_cross_year_validation.description: Requires multi-season validation before any product claim.
conditions: 2024 + 2025 historical odds both available (or future multi-season equivalent)
P65 showed 2025 edge stable-negative — must validate if 2026 changes this
market-edge analysis must span at least 2 MLB seasons
cross-year synthesis required before any production readiness claim
gate_e_cross_year_validation.gate_passes_when: >=2 seasons of legal odds validated through Gates A-D
gate_e_cross_year_validation.current_state: BLOCKED — 2024 odds gap unresolved (P67: partial source only)
gate_e_cross_year_validation.unblocked_by: Legal 2024+2025 odds obtained and validated through Gates A-D

gate_f_governance.name: Governance Invariants
gate_f_governance.description: Ensures governance constraints remain intact during market-edge work.
conditions: no real betting recommendation at any point
forbidden phrase scan passes before each commit
gate_f_governance.current_state: ACTIVE — governance invariants enforced by P80 GOVERNANCE dict
gate_f_governance.unblocked_by: Always-on; does not require external data

step5_validation_gates.sequential_dependency: A → B → C → D → E (all must pass in order before production claim)

P80.name: Market-Edge Lane Re-entry Readiness Contract
P80.trigger: P79B fixture complete and market-edge lane blocked

P81.name: Legal Odds Dataset Validator
P81.trigger: The Odds API key received AND legal data downloaded
P81.deliverable: Odds schema validator, Gates A-C implementation
P81.prerequisite: The Odds API key received + dataset downloaded
P81.notes: Do not create until odds data physically exists. No speculative build.

P82.name: Market-Edge Recomputation Dry-Run (Paper Only)
P82.notes: May reveal whether 2025 negative edge (P65) holds in extended dataset. If edge reverses: requires separate CEO authorization before P84.

P83.name: CLV Timestamp Validation
P83.trigger: P82 passing AND closing line dataset exists
P83.deliverable: CLV timestamp lineage verified, pregame vs closing confirmed
P83.notes: CLV may NOT be computed without verified closing lines. Opening-line only datasets do not qualify.

P84.name: Cross-Year Market-Edge Synthesis
P84.trigger: P83 passing AND 2024+2025 legal odds both validated
P84.notes: Gate E requires >=2 seasons. P84 is the earliest phase where a multi-season edge claim could be made (still paper-only). Production gate remains out of scope beyond P84.

P85_PRODUCTION_GATE.name: Production Gate (Future, Out of Scope)
P85_PRODUCTION_GATE.status: OUT OF SCOPE — not defined in P80
P85_PRODUCTION_GATE.trigger: Requires explicit CEO authorization after P84
P85_PRODUCTION_GATE.notes: P80 does not define P85+. Production remains out of scope.

step6_future_phase_path.next_phase_trigger: The Odds API key received AND legal odds dataset downloaded
step6_future_phase_path.production_gate_phase: NOT YET DEFINED (out of scope for P80-P84)

prediction_only_lane.status: ACTIVE — continues independently of market-edge lane
prediction_only_lane.next_event: 2026 live Tier B n>=200 accumulation → future P79 trigger (~2026-09)
